scripts.deploy: source .env && bunx cdk deploy --all -c telegramBotToken=$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN -c telegramChatId=$TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID -c telegramWebhookSecret=$TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET
scripts.deploy:cert: source .env && bunx cdk deploy OmastoreStatusCertStack -c telegramBotToken=$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN -c telegramChatId=$TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID -c telegramWebhookSecret=$TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET
scripts.deploy:site: source .env && bunx cdk deploy OmastoreStatusStack -c telegramBotToken=$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN -c telegramChatId=$TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID -c telegramWebhookSecret=$TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET
scripts.sync:ui: aws s3 sync site/ s3://omastore-status-152441485310/ --exclude 'state.json' --cache-control 'no-store, max-age=0' --delete
